Package de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature

Class ApplyTFFeature

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.strategy.feature.ApplyTFFeature
All Implemented Interfaces:
Feature
public class ApplyTFFeature extends Object implements Feature
Feature for invoking a term feature on the instantiation of a schema variable

    • computeCost

      public RuleAppCost computeCost(RuleApp app, PosInOccurrence pos, Goal goal)
      Description copied from interface: Feature
      Evaluate the cost of a RuleApp.
      Specified by:
      computeCost in interface Feature
      Parameters:
      app - the RuleApp
      pos - position where app is to be applied
      goal - the goal on which app is to be applied
      Returns:
      the cost of the rule application expressed as a RuleAppCost object. TopRuleAppCost.INSTANCE indicates that the rule shall not be applied at all (it is discarded by the strategy).
